name: Team Tina
subject: Meals on Wheels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
| | Tina recently asked supporters (like you!) to chip in a few bucks to support an organization on the front lines of the coronavirus pandemic. This grassroots team stepped up in a BIG way — raising _thousands_ more for Meals on Wheels. **[So, we’re asking again: Would you consider adding a donation of any amount you can afford to support Meals on Wheels in their effort to make sure no one goes hungry during this crisis? Thanks in advance, and keep reading below for Tina’s message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16582299/176260342/17034053?refcode=em200327-bump&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViNzdlNC02YjcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7TlNdd3-SJ3f_WC1CDc6GVOqarIDGwOG8CAdy_a_A4=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16582300/176260343/17034053?refcode=em200327-bump&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViNzdlNC02YjcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7TlNdd3-SJ3f_WC1CDc6GVOqarIDGwOG8CAdy_a_A4=)
---
_\----- Original message from Tina Smith, March 25, 2020 -----_
Friends,
I reached out to you a few days ago asking you to donate to an organization working on the frontlines of this public health emergency. Your response was incredible!
**Together, we raised _thousands_ of dollars for one of the nation’s largest hunger-relief organizations in the country. **
But as the coronavirus pandemic deepens, so many people are facing unprecedented hardships — especially our seniors. That’s why **Meals on Wheels** is working around the clock to ensure they don’t go hungry during this crisis.
So, I’m emailing you with the hope that you’d be willing to support another great cause at such a critical moment. I need your help to make sure Meals on Wheels can collect as many resources as it will take to keep seniors safe and make sure they’re getting the nutrition they need amid COVID-19.
**[Our nation’s most vulnerable need our help. If you have anything to spare, can I count on you to add a donation to Meals on Wheels today? Your donation would help ensure this organization has the resources to keep our seniors safe and nourished during this public health crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16582302/176260345/17034053?refcode=em200327-bump&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViNzdlNC02YjcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7TlNdd3-SJ3f_WC1CDc6GVOqarIDGwOG8CAdy_a_A4=)**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16582305/176260348/17034053?refcode=em200327-bump&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViNzdlNC02YjcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7TlNdd3-SJ3f_WC1CDc6GVOqarIDGwOG8CAdy_a_A4=)
---
We all have a role to play in slowing the spread of the coronavirus. As you know, I’m doing everything I can in the Senate to support workers and seniors during this crisis. I’m asking you to do the same.
But please, only give if you can afford to do so. I know these are difficult times for many of us, so if your family is facing financial hardship, it’s okay to sit this one out. I appreciate you opening this email in the first place and taking a minute to read my message. It means the world to me.
Thank you. Take care of yourself and your loved ones.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Public Health Advisory Board ❤️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/A3JCO-wcvGD5B5Moeuy3QMht1TdkiurEG3-rEXM0Ykk=?refcode=20200313&amount=25)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/-zExe2OPE8y2N0Pg0NQ7S5gq9V89zbd42WxtID2DFFw=) Hi y'all, We continue to use our campaign platform to get the word out about Coronavirus (COVID-19) resources, dispel some common misconceptions and rumors, and help keep Texans safe. To that end, I created a Public Health Advisory Board made up of medical and health experts in various fields including pulmonary and critical care, family medicine, emergency operations, epidemiologists, and mental health professionals. For the past week, we have been live-streaming on our social channels and answering questions from the public. The live streams have garnered thousands of views already and we're just getting started. Look out for more livestream conversations with experts over the coming days! The top need right now is to collect donations of PPE (gloves, masks, gowns, caps etc) for our front line health care workers. If you are a dentist, veterinarian, have a construction company or any business that can donate some of these, please let us know and we will pick it up anywhere in the Houston area or you alternatively can visit our website to find the dropoff location. Check out our resource page for more info on collection details and to get the latest info on the board and when we're going to stream next: [Sri2020.com/covid19](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/-zExe2OPE8y2N0Pg0NQ7S5gq9V89zbd42WxtID2DFFw=). Remember to stay home and stay safe! Thank you, Sri Preston Kulkarni **** ****
**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/ZVUZ4eltLwht3yTR9bzUBB64jHJRIcnjDxSn-Zu0ksI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/Gt87yJCdoP8L530wgYGNgLGXjtlvzEdOUP6G9jx2hDE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zmkYmPuc_NajqKA7ebNUsrr8ipl_Aq6PIsHjWc2kum0=/jl-SJni5epSn1g3oRm25ws8-NMj9SHEh5XM7UwupAUQ=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.
---

The live streams have garnered thousands of views already and we're just getting started. Look out for more livestream conversations with experts over the coming days! The top need right now is to collect donations of PPE (gloves, masks, gowns, caps etc) for our front line health care workers. If you are a dentist, veterinarian, have a construction company or any business that can donate some of these, please let us know and we will pick it up anywhere in the Houston area or you alternatively can visit our website to find the dropoff location. Check out our resource page for more info on collection details and to get the latest info on the board and when we're going to stream next: =. Remember to stay home and stay safe! Thank you, Sri Preston Kulkarni ** STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = =** | Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77487 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to longer receive emails from us, please =.

Hey, I wanted to make sure you saw my note from yesterday.

---
Hello --
I never imagined sending an email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus.
So, I need to be honest with you: just as this pandemic has surely impacted you and your family, it has impacted our campaign, too.
We've canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last week. And my campaign manager is working overtime to rework our paid media budget, just as Mitch McConnell's super PAC booked millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent.
This crisis will require a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado's Senate seat blue -- one that none of us could have imagined just a few short weeks ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before.
We can't win this election without a lot of folks who are able stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I'm personally asking:
**Please, can I count on you to donate $10 or more right now? If you can spare it, your contribution before our FEC deadline will ensure my team has the resources they need to respond to the attacks from McConnell 's super PAC:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200327?refcode=em-200327-a&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200327?refcode=em-200327-a&amount=50&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200327?refcode=em-200327-a&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200327?refcode=em-200327-a&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200327?refcode=em-200327-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Anything you can chip in today would make a huge difference, but please only give if you can afford it. I know people are struggling right now -- and it's critical you put your family and your health first.
Thanks for all you do. Stay safe, my friend.
-- John
P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. To pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, [fill out this form](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637710df/691c9bd/686ec937/11a75e2e/754740489/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://jhfp.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/covid-19?source=em200326").

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

subject: ICYMI >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

We wanted to check in to make sure you saw the change in our race's rating from _Cook Political Report_.

In case you missed it, they just moved our race from "Likely Democratic" to "Lean Democratic" -- and Republicans are ecstatic.

They are working hard to flip this seat from blue to red -- **but we're working harder to hold onto this seat.**

**[Can you chip in today to help make this happen?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f4/29776869/a1dc416/569fa5fc/1996461918/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjdfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1ubyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200327_cookpoliticalkicker-no")**

Thanks,

Team Christy

\-------------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------------

From: Team Christy
Send time: March 24 at 10:21 am PT
Subject: Update: Ratings change. Republicans are thrilled.

Peter --

While there's a lot going on, we wanted to reach out with an important update on our run-off race:

**_Cook Political Report_ just changed our race rating from "Likely Democratic" to "Lean Democratic" -- a move that Republicans will be thrilled about.**

**[It's all hands on deck. We have less than 7 weeks to save this seat. Will you chip in now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f4/29776869/a1dc416/569fa5fc/1996461918/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjdfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1ubyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200327_cookpoliticalkicker-no")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f4/29776869/a1dc416/569fa5fc/1996461918/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjdfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1ubyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200327_cookpoliticalkicker-no") _Cook_ 's primary reason for changing the rating on this race is that Republican donors love Mike Garcia and are ready to flip a California House seat from blue to red for the first time since 1998.

They're willing to pump a ton of national special interest money into this race to try and take back the House.

But with your help, we're not going to let that happen.

**[Don't let this seat flip -- we need to raise $15,000 by TONIGHT for our campaign. name: Khizr Khan
subject: my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I love this country. My son, Capt. Humayun Khan, gave his life for our country. It brings me great pain to watch President Trump and Mitch McConnell disrespect the American values my son died to protect. [**I 'd walk barefoot across this country to remove Republicans' power and FLIP the Senate. But I can't do it alone.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I'm asking 3,458 patriots to help my dear friend Ben Ray meet his end-of-quarter deadline in 96 hours and WIN. Can I count on your $10? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******
---

******[**Chip in $20 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180")******
---

******[**Chip in $70 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=70&amounts=10,20,130,180")******
---

******[**Chip in $130 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,180")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******
---

In dark times like these, I know every one of us must step up.

If you are concerned by the dangerous direction Trump and his enabler Republicans are taking our country -- [**_I 'm asking you to step forward and give $10 to defeat their Republican Senate. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

If you are disgusted by President Trump and Republicans' attacks on our immigrant communities, our health care, our place on the world stage -- [**_I 'm asking you to elect amazing Democrats like Ben Ray who will reverse their ignorant actions. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

If you are outraged by Republicans' attacks on war heroes like my son, Humayun -- [_**I 'm asking you to step up, remember their sacrifices, and ensure they were not in vain. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

This country is too important for me to sit on the sidelines.

[**But I know it will take every one of us doing our part to end Republicans' injustices.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

[**_That 's why I'm asking you to join my fight, chip in $10 to elect amazing Democrats like Ben Ray, and DEFEAT President Trump and McConnell's Republican Senate. Ben Ray needs 3,458 gifts before his end-of-quarter deadline in 96 hours. Can I count on your $10? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200327_em_fr_b1_khan_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

Humbly yours,

Khizr Khan

---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b629/18e32a7f/4ef0eeda/7b22042f/2534622286/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b629/18e32a7f/4ef0eeda/7b22042c/2534622286/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b629/18e32a7f/4ef0eeda/7b22042d/2534622286/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. name: Team Messner
subject: This week: supporting local business during COVID 19, 2 major endorsements, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/3d27c0ac481f600fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/59a5f131d59d954dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Messner Campaign Announces Two Major Endorsements**
|
---
**Retired 4-Star General and Former Vice Chief of Staff of the United States Army Endorses Corky Messner**
Retired Four-Star Army General John Campbell, former Vice Chief of Staff of the United States Army, has announced his endorsement of Republican U.S. Senate candidate Bryant “Corky” Messner.

“I am so glad Corky has entered the fray and is running for the U.S. Senate,” says Campbell. “Having known him for over 40 years, I believe he will ably and honorably represent the citizens of New Hampshire as their Senator. Given the complex world we live in, and especially now as our country faces a national emergency with the coronavirus, the people of New Hampshire deserve his experience and leadership going forward. Corky’s time in uniform and his becoming an Army Ranger, as well as his skills as a businessman and problem-solver, will help him tackle the tough problems our nation faces.”

Campbell was the commander of the Resolute Support Mission and United States Forces - Afghanistan. He was the last commander of the International Security Assistance Force. Prior to this, he served as the 34th Vice Chief of Staff of the United States Army.

“General Campbell’s endorsement is especially meaningful, given his experience and his long career working to defend our nation and our values,” says Corky. “I value his friendship and am honored by the trust he has placed in me as I continue my efforts to represent the people of this great state.”
|
---
**Manchester Mayoral Candidate Supports Messner Run for U.S. Senate**
Former New Hampshire State Representative and Manchester mayoral candidate Victoria Sullivan has announced her endorsement of Republican U.S. Senate candidate Bryant “Corky” Messner.
“When I was running for Mayor of Manchester, Bryant ‘Corky’ Messner took a personal interest in what was happening in this city. The challenges we face in the Queen City are tough ones, but he never hesitated in joining me during difficult conversations with the homeless and those who have suffered from addiction.

“Politics is too often about the status quo and gamesmanship, but with Corky Messner, it is the complete opposite of that. The time he has dedicated to understanding the struggles of the people of Manchester has proven to me that he is in this race for the right reasons. He truly cares about our state and its people. The career politicians have failed us in Washington and in these times more than ever, we need men and women to step up and fight for us. I believe Bryant ‘Corky’ Messner will do just that, which is why I am proud to endorse him in this race.”

“Victoria’s support is important to me, we share a passion for helping people and we both believe Granite Staters are demanding a change,” says Corky. “It’s time their elected representatives reflect their beliefs and values, and I thank Victoria for supporting my efforts to become New Hampshire’s U.S. Senator.”
|
---
**Tele-Town Halls Continue**
Corky’s ‘virtual’ voter meetings, part of his _Granite State Conversations_ initiative, will continue to be scheduled in the weeks to come. Since the first call, hundreds of Granite Staters have taken this opportunity to chat by phone with the candidate and ask questions on issues critical to New Hampshire and the nation.
“Coronavirus social distancing guidelines may have made these tele-town halls a new staple of our campaign, but it’s clear to me New Hampshire folks continue to stand together in spirit and political philosophy,” says Corky. “These events give me a chance for voters to learn more about me, and allow me to focus on what’s on their minds, and how I can best represent them as their next U.S. Senator.”

For more information on tele-town halls and other upcoming events, visit the website, **[https://www.corkyforsenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/9dbea91916141696c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**Our Current Crisis is No Laughing Matter, says Corky**
It seems Congress has managed to pass a much-needed Coronavirus stimulus package, but getting that approval showed partisan politics on full display, says Corky.
“Images of bare supermarket shelves, deserted streets and shuttered businesses are upsetting enough, but for me, the most disturbing sight during this COVID-19 pandemic may well have been New Hampshire’s U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen laughing as she voted against a desperately-needed $2 trillion coronavirus stimulus package.”
Senator Shaheen and other Democrats voted down the Republican measure not once, but twice, a measure that would help business and families in dire economic straits. Corky points out, “The woman who constantly crows about bipartisanship and how we must all work together demonstrates time and again that she will not break from the progressive orthodoxy no matter how critical the situation or important the opportunity.”
|
---
**Messner Minute: Local NH Businesses Need Your Help**
In a recent Messner Minute, Corky talks about how we can support local businesses while also following Coronavirus safety guidelines during this critical time. **[Listen in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/54bb38f9ef51b13bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**!
|
---
**IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO**
Once again, here’s a list of resources for Granite Staters in need of assistance or information. Please do all you can to keep yourself, your family and friends, and your community healthy – and remember to support local businesses!

**HEALTH INFORMATON**

White House Guidelines: 15 Days to Slow the Spread – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/db23e8f0a794506fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/fc689f0e148f7e0fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/b26abce8d10ad49ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/4a970c7daee6162dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**Resources for Small Business** – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/69524ea45448e7c4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR PARENTS AND SCHOOLS**

**FOR ASSISTANCE – FOOD**

**Meals on Wheels** – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/419c3b8183f130f2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**School Food and Nutrition Service** – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/5cdd357e4acd3cdac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP**

**NH Food Bank** – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/cc143d93cc22d1e5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
**American Red Cross** – New Hampshire – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/046e05d8cfb0a603/8018d97a90d62fe2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
**Meals on Wheels** – To volunteer – **Click here**.
|

name: Team Dietzen
subject: ** Critical deadline TUESDAY **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Our campaign is adapting to our new realities. Read more inside >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/2e00670108b32e12c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, The end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is now JUST DAYS away. As part of this our campaign is quickly adapting to our new realities under coronavirus. Our focus has been: 1) Continuing to make sure we have the resources to communicate and build a winning campaign in the coming weeks. 2) Reorganizing our budget so we can move this campaign from offline to 100% online – for the health and well-being of our staff, volunteers and our community. This requires us to pivot our resources to more digital ads, cell phones so volunteers can text voters from home, and video-conferencing tools so we can host online town halls -- they're all part of our plan to keep our team and voters safe. Making these changes is our way of showing that we believe how serious this pandemic is – but they do come at a cost. It is important for voters to be able to get to know Dr. Chuck and why he is the right candidate to represent Indiana in the 5th District. Now more than ever, we need “A Doctor in the House.” Help us get his message out to voters. Fellow Hoosier, our records show that you have not donated yet. **[Altogether, we need to raise $10,000 by midnight on Tuesday, March 31. This is an important filing deadline for our campaign. Will you support Dr. Chuck?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/a7056cce5ce90699c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**
[ **$5 to send 50 text messages** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/37bf72c09796c531c3d6b838967d376c/33363) [ **$12 to pay for a video-conferencing platform** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/d5a7eacd30d49398c3d6b838967d376c/33363) [ **$40 to pay cell phone bills for staffers** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/fd9624c3f23e0f88c3d6b838967d376c/33363) [ **$100 to buy a Facebook ad to reach 1,000 voters** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/5cd2e2cafe226e37c3d6b838967d376c/33363) What we are experiencing is truly unprecedented – but Team Dietzen is coming together like nothing we’ve ever seen before. **[Please respond by 11:59 p.m. Tuesday, March 31st before the FEC deadline strikes](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/1b2132fe71287d1ac3d6b838967d376c/33363)**. Even if you can only donate a few dollars, it will be a HUGE help as we work to show that Hoosiers are rallying behind Dr. Chuck! \- Team Dietzen P.S. Show that you’re standing with Dr. Chuck in this race before it’s too late! **[Tap or click to donate now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/482593d917d47c72c3d6b838967d376c/33363).** [ **Support Dr. Chuck!** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/844c983f04e68222c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/5899d584bc9190f3c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9382a756cea05d94/c032ed50383ab952c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: Charles Booker
subject: This is how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Here's our strategy on how we take back Kentucky.
#
I wanted to reach out today to share with you the plan on how we're going to secure the Democratic nomination and defeat Mitch McConnell in November.
**Most campaigns don't widely share this information and keep it under wraps.** But this isn't about me or my campaign staff – it's about all of us, and I want you to be in the know.
And full disclosure: I'll need to ask you for your help in funding this plan with whatever amount you can.
[**If you're already on board, chip in here. Otherwise, please keep reading.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585558/176294565/-225423421?refcode=em20200327-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=)
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585559/176294566/-225423421?refcode=em20200327-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=)****
Here's how we're going to beat Mitch (and flip the Senate):
* **The primary:** I'm not the Democratic establishment's favorite to take on Mitch, and we're expecting to be outspent in the primary. This race will be extremely, extremely competitive, but we're ready to fight for – and earn – every single vote through June 23.
* **Not shying away from the problems:** I’ve been there, just like many Kentuckians have: filing for unemployment, paying as much as $1,000 a month for my insulin, trying to make ends meet. We won't shy away from talking about everyday problems, and we'll fight for solutions like Medicare for All, Universal Basic Income, and a Green New Deal.
* **Growing our online strategy:** Every day, our campaign speaks with hundreds and thousands of Kentuckians, all on virtual mediums from a safe distance. We'll invest resources into growing and expanding our online presence, with live-streamed town halls, online ads, and virtual phone banks.
* **The general election:** We're not going to unseat Mitch and his corrupt politics with half measures or typical tactics. We will use our grassroots, people-first movement to bring the people of Kentucky together to use our collective power and change the course of history.

Trying to unseat an incumbent will be difficult – especially one who's held office since 1985 and happens to be one of the most powerful men in Washington. But I believe we're building the kind of grassroots movement that has the right message and energy to finally pull this off. _All we need now is enough money to fund this plan._
**[So I'm asking yet again for your help. Will you chip in whatever amount you are able to fund our plan to defeat Mitch and bring a brighter future to all Kentuckians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585560/176294567/-225423421?refcode=em20200327-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=)**
Thanks for being in this fight.
Charles
P.S. We want to hear from you and your thoughts on this plan. What would you like to add? What do you think needs a little more work? Reply to this email, and let's chat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585561/176294568/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=&emci=3fb38f36-5170-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=052597c9-7a70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585562/176294569/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=&emci=3fb38f36-5170-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=052597c9-7a70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16585563/176294570/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI1OTdjOS03YTcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APrC90OuuWGsLUO7eJfqgh-d8tHwP23ZB2e_2Z60Xt4=&emci=3fb38f36-5170-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=052597c9-7a70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today, we're announcing Warren Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This year, we'll be working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Yes, we need to win the White House, and we need to keep the House, take back the Senate, and win a whole bunch of state... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94bce/14705837/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm no longer running for president of the United States.

But our grassroots movement was never just about winning one election.

In Pennsylvania and across the country, people have come together to fight side by side for big, structural change -- not for me, but for _each other_. That fight goes on.

**And today, we 're announcing Warren Democrats to power that fight.**

Warren Democrats is a movement for everybody who believes in the power of bold, inclusive reform to root out corruption in government and put power in the hands of the people.

Right now, that means working to ensure we put people first in solving the coronavirus outbreak and the economic crisis in the short term -- and rebuilding our economy in the long term.

This movement will not only support my re-election campaign for Senate, but will also support other Democratic candidates who share our vision, mobilize people to support those candidates and our ideas, and continue to build the grassroots movement that you've started.

**[If you're fired up to stay in this fight, sign up today to join us.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a31/14705837/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI3X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200327_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

This year, we'll be working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Yes, we need to win the White House, and we need to keep the House, take back the Senate, and win a whole bunch of state legislative races.

But we can't wait until November to begin delivering solutions for people who are hurting right now.

**As we 've already seen, this crisis has put a spotlight on a number of existing structural issues: how our federal government operates and who it works for, the fragility of an economy that is skewed against working people, and the importance of universal health care and paid leave not just in times of crisis, but in our everyday lives.**

The solutions we advocate for now can and should have a lasting impact on our economy and our government. America can come out of this crisis stronger than before -- but only if we rally around bold solutions, rather than temporary fixes and short-term deals.

So when a greedy corporation is trying to rig the system and cheat working people, we'll speak out.

When Democrats are running on strong progressive values, we'll shine a spotlight on them.

And whenever the door is open -- even just a crack -- for real, systematic reform -- we'll shove our shoulders into that door, push it open all the way, and give the fight everything we've got.

But understand this: Because we're fighting to put power in the hands of the people, we'll still have plenty of people standing in our way. Big banks and powerful special interests don't want you and me to stay in the fight. They want us to lick our wounds, hide in a corner, whimper, and whine.

I'm not going to give them the satisfaction. I'm going to keep fighting back -- and I hope you will, too.

I'm deeply grateful for the chance to keep up the fight alongside you and families across the country as the senior senator from Massachusetts. And I know we have the opportunity to keep pushing for the big, structural change our government, economy, and democracy still sorely need.

**[I'll always be honored to fight by your side. Add your name right now to say that you're staying in this fight all the way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a31/14705837/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI3X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200327_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thank you, as always, for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**SIGN UP**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a31/14705837/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI3X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200327_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a30/14705837/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a33/14705837/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a32/14705837/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a35/14705837/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a34/14705837/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525781/45c30650/1f75bdbaf/66e94a37/14705837/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Bill Olson
subject: The Democrats want to destroy America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw

Hi Peter

I'm Bill Olson, the combat vet and patriot running to take back Florida's 9th Dsirtcit from Democrat Darren Soto.

This week, Pelosi's Democrats - like Soto- went too far, and your help is needed to fix this

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw
!

This week, Nancy Pelosi fiddled while the country's economy burned. As 3.3 million Americans went on unemployment because the country's economy arrested due to the Coronavirus crisis, Pelosi and Soto saw fit to play partisan games with the American people:

In a call that included 200 members of the House Democratic caucus Thursday, lawmakers brainstormed their progressive non-COVID-19-related wish list to be included in the COVID-19 relief bill. Their ideas spanned increased Social Security benefits, extra funding for infrastructure, and in the event the Wuhan virus stretches into the November election timeline, funding for state-run, all-mail voting programs.

“This is a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision,” Majority Whip James Clyburn, D-S.C., said to the caucus members, according to a source on the call.

As millions of Americans struggle to make ends meet and look to their elected officials for direction and hope, House Democrats remain steadfast in their opposition to President Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP and in their dedication to pushing a radical progressive policy agenda, no matter the cost to their hurting constituents.

This Coronavirus is the Democrats' dream. They get to spend government money like monopoly money, on "priorities" like illegal immigrants, the Kennedy Center, the Green New Deal, and NOT on helping Americans who desperately needed it.

And Darren Soto? He released the most partisan, hate-filled screed to line right up behind anti-American Nancy Pelosi:

As if his mishandling of the U.S. coronavirus response wasn’t bad enough, President Donald Trump has now called for steep bailouts for multinational corporations affected by the coronavirus. This goes too far. The Republicans already hindered our ability to respond to an economic crisis by doubling our national deficit to $1 trillion with their ill-conceived 2017 tax cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans during what was then a good economy.

These extremists only want a cheap way to enact their unpopular agenda- except, it's not cheap, their agenda is REALLY unpopular, and they didn't want to do ANYTHING to help the average American suffering because of the Coronavirus crisis.

This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. They want to help their Socialist buddies and make life bad for you. Can you help me stop them?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw

I have an important fundraising deadline at the end of this month - I have to raise another $11,765 to keep pace with Bloomberg, whose billions bought this seat for Darren Soto and the Dems.

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? Can you help me reach my goal?

I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=qQwA01dMZFAbvfTxyQZXsw
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

P.P.S. You are invited to my campaign kick off in Kissimmee, FL on March 17th at the Italian Joint starting at 6 pm. Get your free ticket here.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fzbBb7wOr_6OuRU&b=ltQbGvgckxRA3Hvm1SCNcw
I look forward to meeting you!

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Image Hi Peter I'm Bill Olson, the combat vet and patriot running to take back Florida's 9th Dsirtcit from Democrat Darren Soto. This week, Pelosi's Democrats - like Soto- went too far, and your help is needed to fix this ! This week, Nancy Pelosi fiddled while the country's economy burned. As 3.3 million Americans went on unemployment because the country's economy arrested due to the Coronavirus crisis, Pelosi and Soto saw fit to play partisan games with the American people: In a call that included 200 members of the House Democratic caucus Thursday, lawmakers brainstormed their progressive non-COVID-19-related wish list to be included in the COVID-19 relief bill. Their ideas spanned increased Social Security benefits, extra funding for infrastructure, and in the event the Wuhan virus stretches into the November election timeline, funding for state-run, all-mail voting programs. “This is a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision,” Majority Whip James Clyburn, D-S.C., said to the caucus members, according to a source on the call. As millions of Americans struggle to make ends meet and look to their elected officials for direction and hope, House Democrats remain steadfast in their opposition to President Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP and in their dedication to pushing a radical progressive policy agenda, no matter the cost to their hurting constituents. This Coronavirus is the Democrats' dream. They get to spend government money like monopoly money, on "priorities" like illegal immigrants, the Kennedy Center, the Green New Deal, and NOT on helping Americans who desperately needed it. And Darren Soto? He released the most partisan, hate-filled screed to line right up behind anti-American Nancy Pelosi: As if his mishandling of the U.S. coronavirus response wasn’t bad enough, President Donald Trump has now called for steep bailouts for multinational corporations affected by the coronavirus. This goes too far. The Republicans already hindered our ability to respond to an economic crisis by doubling our national deficit to $1 trillion with their ill-conceived 2017 tax cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans during what was then a good economy. These extremists only want a cheap way to enact their unpopular agenda- except, it's not cheap, their agenda is REALLY unpopular, and they didn't want to do ANYTHING to help the average American suffering because of the Coronavirus crisis. This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. They want to help their Socialist buddies and make life bad for you. Can you help me stop them? I have an important fundraising deadline at the end of this month - I have to raise another $11,765 to keep pace with Bloomberg, whose billions bought this seat for Darren Soto and the Dems. Can I count on you for a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? Can you help me reach my goal? I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford. No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill. P.P.S. You are invited to my campaign kick off in Kissimmee, FL on March 17th at the Italian Joint starting at 6 pm. Get your free ticket here. I look forward to meeting you! PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. 5 Halifax Ct Marlton NJ 08053 USA To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:

| Peter,
Welcome to the "shelter in place" edition of our campaign update. Over the last few weeks, campaigning has taken a back seat as we focus our efforts on helping individuals and small businesses navigate this crisis and get access to the resources they need.
To that end, [we've created a COVID-19 Resources section on our website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oBqXPOvJsdwEZ0dqnja1ixpidOo500cCuqfjVQGxaHZFo03ys-IS-oZc3yaFzprIuE0_Odhsb4DAPeGVjLRKp8v0PoYYPpQo9uc0djmtwyrWIrg2Jtn1kt96z1xPNx_0JWJ8bpMoi1QAI2cHpXuGhT3ca9ioSl-E_w8xcr0ejP7o9gC0XDClVg==&c=nu8c0adJfaQV0DGqgdviZB3nd5GavbuCjWc87KSmf-avgj67SGZtZA==&ch=yxMK7NS7Ge4vnL1ON6YfG_KH5_9v89cfiWxQv5krhvHvKV5VQyiZtA==). It is routinely being updated with new information about school meals, small business assistance, local restrictions, and more. Click/tap the image below to check it out.

| My campaign team and I have also been volunteering to help out in any way possible. Today, I went to CitySquare Food Pantry. You can click below to watch the entire video and make a contribution to their efforts.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oBqXPOvJsdwEZ0dqnja1ixpidOo500cCuqfjVQGxaHZFo03ys-IS-oZc3yaFzprIS1YS7H0tcMdUxwzSyZ_Ia8HwA8UpHxK9EJIv4U-c1S_QCgrKOPaBXLCzH6dlRdE1fz_gUB3sdJF5vxHtbOnzgCdwSMCS060l8Qc4hvjuptDTRVf6oFP9tGkoVAtfNSU8AXt595OW44k=&c=nu8c0adJfaQV0DGqgdviZB3nd5GavbuCjWc87KSmf-avgj67SGZtZA==&ch=yxMK7NS7Ge4vnL1ON6YfG_KH5_9v89cfiWxQv5krhvHvKV5VQyiZtA==)
---
| After days of disappointing political game playing by congressional Democrats, Congress finally passed a coronavirus relief package today, which was signed by President Trump.
While this legislation is not perfect, and anything with a $2 trillion price tag deserves scrutiny, the fact of the matter is that ultimately, this legislation is not hard to support.
This is not a joke or a game. North Texans are losing their jobs. North Texans are getting sick. Yet Nancy Pelosi and her enablers like Colin Allred, who has voted with her 100% of the time, stalled relief efforts for days on end to make a political statement. It is exactly what people despise about Washington, and it's why they're yearning for outsiders to come shake it up.

| I hope you, your family, and all your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these unprecedented times. If you don't already do so, I encourage you to follow us on social media at the links below to stay up to date with the latest news from our campaign.
Thank you and God bless,

Dear Friend, Our government is giving corporations like Boeing 14 billion dollars, while nurses are literally dying from lack of protective gear. This is a shameful moment in America, and**it is time to take a stand**! Doyle has been in this fight for two decades, and she's never backing down: People before Profits. March 31 is our last campaign filing deadline with the FEC, and the amount we raise this month will send a message to the establishment that our movement is strong and growing. But only if every supporter sends a contribution now. We are still falling short on our goal. [Make a contribution today to show the world that we are determined to win.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-gA/ni0YAA/t.30f/UdVkeY3lT0-jJY2uKuutVw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnd1vCyyxPLmSC-2F67ADtsv5g-2FZtR6hnbE5m-2F3OUxt7-2BrR9mce0Gy3jwesNNDqkRvYfe92GewVcPHQPOpJt0u1H1bTN7ZppTlb7keKN0CzNai5L75UoYQ-2BCOKyoXGip1HueW50Qg1tjJ2-2Fe9SXzoxA5E1RkJVNmxCG8-2FdgTR03yx63/m7Ci)

We are in this fight together because we know that corporate money in politics has corrupted our system, and it can cost lives. Change comes when the people organize, leading with visionary ideas and building powerful movements. We will win this campaign because our team has the drive, grit and courage to face the current crisis head on. Together, we are building a new coalition of diverse voices and progressive vision that will fight for our people, planet, and future. Onward, Team Canning

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
The United States government is us, and it is the only entity capable of marshaling the resources at scale to stop this nationwide pandemic. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16586635/176304591/2013293945?refcode=em032720-header&refcode2=b321a91a-8070-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzIxYTkxYS04MDcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8TpHiF2Z4Y3ZIa3IuU8Ev-Gg7HZ6SXS424YtA0ZdMI=) **** | | Friend,

**The United States government is us, and it is the only entity capable of marshaling the resources at scale to stop this nationwide pandemic. As a two-term mayor, public safety director, and head of Homeland Security who has the experience in crisis simulation working alongside the Army at Ft. Benning, I am prepared to put us on the right course to stop this pandemic and prevent the spread of disease in the future.**

**[But I am counting on your support before this FEC deadline to reach our $25,000 end-of-quarter goal. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: House passes emergency relief bill
body:
The CARES Act is headed to President Trump’s desk today! | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=218cef4e79&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: House passes emergency relief bill**

**The CARES Act** is headed to President Trump’s desk today! Following extensive negotiations between the Trump Administration and Congressional leaders, the House of Representatives finally passed the historic $2.2 trillion economic relief package.

**The Senate** approved the measure yesterday with a 96-0 vote.

**What does it mean?** American families, healthcare workers, and small businesses will get the economic support they need to get through this challenging time. That includes $1,200 payments to qualifying Americans, $100 billion in direct support for hospitals, and over $370 billion to small business owners to keep their employees on the payroll.

**President Trump** will sign the bill as soon as it arrives at his desk this afternoon.

[WATCH LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: White House holds Coronavirus Task Force briefing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21e5327d79&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **📱****Apple teams up with White House on COVID-19 app!**

**Trusted medical information** is crucial for Americans in our fight against the Coronavirus. Now, it’ll be easier than ever to find.

**Apple Inc.** , together with the White House, the CDC, and FEMA, has launched a COVID-19 screening tool. The app guides users through questions about symptoms and exposure, using CDC recommendations to help determine what steps people should take, including whether to seek testing.

**The CDC** will update guidance regularly to make sure the app’s screening criteria stays timely. In addition, the CDC will make the underlying recommendations and algorithms [“open source,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7adce8ba3a&e=3ee4985eea) allowing others in the private sector to build innovative tools using them.

**American companies** such as Apple have [stepped up to answer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b29b50239a&e=3ee4985eea) President Trump’s call for a public-private alliance against this virus. Some great businesses have responded in more ways than one. Earlier this week, Apple CEO Tim Cook announced that his company planned to [donate 10 million masks](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29422d5f97&e=3ee4985eea) to help our medical community.

**When all of America unites,** no enemy stands a chance—including this invisible one.

[Apple releases new COVID-19 app and website based on CDC guidance](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=255c1f7f7c&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **VP Pence** : [“We can do this, America—but it will take all of us.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd3f743046&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump**** ****and Vice President Pence**** ****participate**** ****in a video teleconference with Governors on COVID-19** | March 26, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8220e20edc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ff40b042b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f68592466f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Ryan from Team Tina
subject: Re: FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend, I wanted to start out by saying _thank you_. I know this is an incredibly difficult time for so many families and communities, but our team has been blown away by your support. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts. The fact is that even in these really challenging times, we still face our first FEC filing deadline of this critical election year on March 31 and have goals we can’t afford to miss. So, I am about to ask if you could make a contribution of any amount meaningful to you today — but, please, only donate if you can afford to do so. The health and safety of you and your loved ones is our top priority. **As you already know, there’s so much at stake in this election and it’s on us to keep a champion like Tina in the Senate — fighting for universal paid sick leave, protecting and expanding affordable health care, raising the minimum wage, and more.** With that in mind, here comes the part where I ask for your help: **Can you add a donation of any amount you can afford toward our first FEC goal to help save Minnesota’s Senate seat and re-elect Tina Smith? clean_body: | Friend, I wanted to start out by saying thank you. I know this is an incredibly difficult time for so many families and communities, but our team has been blown away by your support. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts. The fact is that even in these really challenging times, we still face our first FEC filing deadline of this critical election year on March 31 and have goals we can’t afford to miss. So, I am about to ask if you could make a contribution of any amount meaningful to you today — but, please, only donate if you can afford to do so. The health and safety of you and your loved ones is our top priority. As you already know, there’s so much at stake in this election and it’s on us to keep a champion like Tina in the Senate — fighting for universal paid sick leave, protecting and expanding affordable health care, raising the minimum wage, and more. With that in mind, here comes the part where I ask for your help: Can you add a donation of any amount you can afford toward our first FEC goal to help save Minnesota’s Senate seat and re-elect Tina Smith? Please, only chip in if you can. Thanks in advance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Friend, whether you can contribute today or not, you are an important part of this team. We are so grateful for your support. I hope you are staying safe and healthy during this difficult time. Thank you. — Ryan Ryan Furlong Campaign Manager Tina for Minnesota P.S. Messages like these can be a bit overwhelming at times — especially during this pandemic. If you’d like to pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Hoosiers all over Indiana are tackling the coronavirus head-on — rolling up their sleeves and helping their community get through this tough time. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

**Hoosiers all over Indiana are tackling the coronavirus head-on — rolling up their sleeves and helping their fellow Hoosiers get through this tough time. **

The constant news cycle surrounding the coronavirus and its impact on our state can be overwhelming. It’s more important than ever to stay informed, but it’s also crucial to remind yourself of the good deeds Hoosiers are doing across our state — from Lake Michigan to the Ohio River and everywhere in between.

We’re hearing all kinds of amazing stories about Hoosiers helping Hoosiers...and we’re sharing them through our social media accounts. Check some of these incredible stories out below:

| | Friends, I wrote this email to let you know why I'm in this fight. [**If you don 't have time to read it, that's fine -- I ask you to please donate to our campaign here and help us raise the remaining $12,540 of our goal.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_eoq1?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+If+you+donrsquot+have+time+to+read+it+th&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1") If you aren't sure about donating, that's fine, too -- I'd ask you to just take a moment and read below. | | | [Pitch in >>](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_eoq1?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Pitch+in+gtgt&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200327_EOQ2_U2_X1")
---
* * *
**What does it take to serve your country?**
Determination. Guts. A belief that this country stands for something that's worth fighting for. When I served as a U.S. Air Force combat pilot, I brought all these attributes and developed them even deeper.
**What does it take to raise a family?**
Love. Commitment. And, unfortunately, a lot of luck. When my son was immediately sent to the Intensive Care Unit after he was born, it could have been devastating. If we hadn't been in a quality hospital, the care might not have been enough. If we didn't have decent health insurance, the bills might have ruined us and stopped us from providing for our son. **This is the United States of America -- we shouldn 't have to depend on luck for these things.**
**What does it take for extreme Republicans in Congress to do their jobs and look out for hard-working families?**
Evidently, it will never happen -- not even in the midst of global pandemic. I got a taste for this when shortly after my son was born, Steve Chabot voted to cut care for preexisting conditions. If he had his way, my son may have died or grown up in poverty.
**What does it take to run for Congress?**
Determination. Commitment. A belief that this country stands for something that's worth fighting for, and that the people we've previously elected have failed in this fight. My whole life has led to this moment. **I have what it takes.**
Unfortunately, it also takes money. My family is a working family -- I don't have elite connections to fall back on. All I have are my values, and you.

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: How we're tackling the COVID-19 crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
I know this is a time of uncertainty. As Mayor of Topeka, I have been busy working to keep everyone in our community healthy and safe, and I want to share an update about what we've been doing to combat the virus.

Friends,

I know this is a time of uncertainty. As Mayor of Topeka, I have been busy working to keep everyone in our community healthy and safe, and I want to share an update about what we've been doing to combat the virus.

Right now, more than ten counties in the 2nd District have issued stay-at-home or safer-at-home orders to prevent community spread of COVID-19. If you are living in a county with these orders, you _cannot_ leave your home unless it is absolutely necessary to conduct an essential activity, such as getting groceries, seeking medical care, or working at an essential business.

Earlier this week, I went on Facebook to talk about COVID-19 and answer questions directly from fellow Kansans. If you missed it, **[you can watch it here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16589763/176346464/-1151921765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0NTg1Yi05MzcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1isLk6DQ0yqx6b5QZTJFTDBqOTBWUiH6M4C5ATxFNTc=&emci=b37a0ba9-6f70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f324585b-9370-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16589764/176346465/-1151921765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0NTg1Yi05MzcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1isLk6DQ0yqx6b5QZTJFTDBqOTBWUiH6M4C5ATxFNTc=&emci=b37a0ba9-6f70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f324585b-9370-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)
We are not asking you to stay at home because we don’t care about you -- in fact, it’s the exact opposite. We are asking you to stay home because our community leaders care immensely about each and every one of you, and we want all of you to be here when this is over to celebrate that we were able to overcome this challenge.

Our communities are coming together like never before. All across the district, I am hearing about ways that people are helping each other during one of our greatest times of need. Schools are making sack lunches to students with limited resources. We have started a warmline so that there is a number to call when you are feeling lonely. Hundreds of residents throughout the district are volunteering for Meals on Wheels and buying groceries for elderly neighbors and child care centers.

Stories like these are a great reminder that we're all going to get through this together. This is who you are, Kansas. You are resilient and strong. You care about each other -- and you care enough to stay home. This is what being a Kansan is all about.

Please remember to watch your _local_ media outlets for updates about how COVID-19 is specifically affecting your county. The national news can be very discouraging, so please do not overwhelm yourself with what is happening in neighboring states or abroad. All we can control is how our state, counties, cities, and individual households respond to the virus. Please do your part and stay home.

If you have questions about COVID-19, call the Kansas Department of Health and Environment at **866-534-3463** or **[visit the CDC's website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16589765/176346466/-1368851855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0NTg1Yi05MzcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1isLk6DQ0yqx6b5QZTJFTDBqOTBWUiH6M4C5ATxFNTc=&emci=b37a0ba9-6f70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f324585b-9370-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**. For up-to-date information on current recommendations, please click on the **[CDC's prevention guidelines.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16589766/176346467/2000163389?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0NTg1Yi05MzcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1isLk6DQ0yqx6b5QZTJFTDBqOTBWUiH6M4C5ATxFNTc=&emci=b37a0ba9-6f70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f324585b-9370-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

Stay safe and be well,

Michelle

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

Text 'KANSAS' to 31996 to get updates and stay involved in the campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b37a0ba9-6f70-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/f324585b-9370-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0NTg1Yi05MzcwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1isLk6DQ0yqx6b5QZTJFTDBqOTBWUiH6M4C5ATxFNTc=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Cornyn Alert
subject: Sen. Cornyn's record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
When compared with MJ's lifetime of service, there's no question that MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c6/7f51f7bc/4cc3030c/4ef1dd18/1601612179/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c6/7f51f7bc/4cc3030c/4ef1dd1f/1601612179/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200327.2nd__1121__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hey Peter -- When you compare Senator John Cornyn's record with MJ's lifetime of service, there's no question that MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate. Sen. Cornyn's record includes:
* Spending 18 years accomplishing nothing for Texans in Washington.
* Cowering to DC bosses like Mitch McConnell.
* Voting to rip access to health care away from millions of Texans.
* Selling Texans out to special interests, from Big Pharma to the gun lobby.

**[It's no wonder Senator Cornyn is vulnerable. We can beat him together -- pitch in to help MJ get it done!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c6/7f51f7bc/4cc3030c/4ef1dd1f/1601612179/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200327.2nd__1121__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

In contrast to Sen. Cornyn, MJ's entire life has been about fighting for what's right. She:
* Took on the Taliban when her rescue helicopter was shot down in Afghanistan.
* Faced down the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women.
* Is committed to making sure _every_ Texan has affordable health care.
* Won't take corporate PAC money and is endorsed by End Citizens United for her commitment to ending the influence of money in politics.

MJ is the strongest candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn. With the runoff already underway, MJ is counting on your support! **Pitch in now to help us keep growing MJ 's grassroots campaign to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: What's in the coronavirus bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d54e/53d9897e/53242215/1c899b2d/2405860092/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

This week, the Senate passed a third package of coronavirus relief funding. We know there was a lot of back and forth on this package, so we want to outline exactly what was included. Mark was personally involved in negotiations and fought hard alongside his Democratic Senate colleagues for a bipartisan relief bill that addresses this public health crisis, puts our workers first, and delivers for the people of Virginia. This wasn't about partisan politics -- it was about strong protections for our workforce and first responders and about putting together a robust plan to bolster our health care response to this pandemic.

This bill provided more than $2 trillion in funding to combat the coronavirus. Here's what the bill included:
* **Direct payments to working Americans** , which are **doubled** in the latest version of the bill. This breaks down into a $1,200 payment for most Americans, and an additional $500 for children.

* **An unprecedented investment in our health care system** , toward personal and protective equipment for health care workers, testing supplies and support for emergency centers. The bill also increases Medicare payments to hospitals and providers and invests in medical research into COVID-19.

* **A major expansion of unemployment insurance** , creating a long-term lifeline for workers struggling during this outbreak. This includes full paycheck replacement for many workers and an extension of benefits. Mark also personally fought to expand access to unemployment benefits for part-time, self-employed, and gig economy workers.

* **A rescue plan for small businesses** , including loan forgiveness grants for small businesses and non-profits and emergency grant funding to provide immediate relief to small businesses. The bill also includes two programs Mark personally fought for to keep workers on the payroll at small and mid-sized businesses.

* **Emergency appropriations** , including support for federal, state, and local public health agencies, FEMA Disaster Relief funding, funding for our transit systems, and grants to support local school systems so they can continue to educate our students. The bill also includes nearly $16 billion to ensure no one who loses their job goes hungry during the pandemic.

* **Student loan relief** through a tax incentive Mark authored encouraging employers to create student loan repayment programs.

* **A fund to support states, tribes, and local governments** pay for new expenses related to the coronavirus outbreak.

* **Protections against foreclosures and evictions** for Americans who are struggling to make ends meet.

* **Built-in transparency and accountability** , including real-time reporting of Treasury actions under this legislation, and prohibition on businesses controlled by members of the Trump administration or Members of Congress from getting loans or investments from Treasury programs.

While not a perfect bill, this legislation will immediately begin helping workers, small businesses and healthcare providers who need it most. As our country continues to grapple with this crisis, Mark will keep fighting to get the best deal for Virginians and all Americans during this outbreak.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d54e/53d9897e/53242215/1c899b2c/2405860092/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d54e/53d9897e/53242215/1c899b2b/2405860092/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---
